title: randia micracantha
intro: Randia micracantha, also known as the small-fruited Randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Randia micracantha include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for herbalists and traditional healers.
